remember: Recall the major water resources of the world.
Identify the sources and types of water resources.
List the factors affecting the distribution and management of water resources.
Describe the importance of water resources in sustaining life and human settlements.
understand: Explain the concept of water cycle and its significance in water distribution.
Describe the role of groundwater and its importance in irrigation and drinking water supply.
Understand the impact of human activities on water resources and their management.
Explain the concept of water scarcity and its effects on ecosystems and human populations.
apply: Apply the concepts of water management and conservation to real-world scenarios.
Analyze the impact of human activities on water resources and suggest measures for their management.
Use geographical concepts to evaluate the effectiveness of water resource management policies.
Apply the principles of sustainable development to water resource management.
analyze: Analyze the spatial distribution of water resources and their availability in different regions.
Evaluate the impact of climate change on water resources and their management.
Analyze the effectiveness of water resource management policies in different countries.
Identify the challenges and opportunities in water resource management and suggest strategies for their mitigation.

ncert_objectives: Explain the role of water in the Earth's ecosystems and the impact of human activities on water resources.
Describe the major types of water resources and their distribution in different regions of the world.
Discuss the importance of water conservation and sustainable management of water resources.
Explain the concept of water scarcity and its effects on ecosystems and human populations.
board_exam_objectives: Identify the sources and types of water resources.
Describe the factors affecting the distribution and management of water resources.
Explain the importance of water resources in sustaining life and human settlements.
Discuss the impact of human activities on water resources and their management.
